DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
Conflict.CraftSpeedController.Note: Both mods speed up crafting. With both running, crafts go even faster.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose crafting diagnostics to the BepInEx console - which workbench, which craft, which speed branch was applied. Useful for reporting bugs. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.craft_speed_multiplier.name: Craft Speed Multiplier
cfg.craft_speed_multiplier.desc: Multiplier applied to crafts at regular workbenches (anvils, alchemy, cooking, study desks, etc.). Repair crafts are always excluded to protect per-frame energy cost. Gardens, composting, and zombie-worked stations each have their own toggle further down.
cfg.faster_build_and_destroy.name: Faster Build And Destroy
cfg.faster_build_and_destroy.desc: When on, placing new structures and tearing down old ones happens faster.
cfg.build_and_destroy_speed.name: Build And Destroy Speed
cfg.build_and_destroy_speed.desc: Multiplier for the build/destroy speed when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_composting.name: Speed Up Composting
cfg.speed_up_composting.desc: Speed up the compost heap so it turns waste into fertiliser faster.
cfg.composting_multiplier.name: Composting Multiplier
cfg.composting_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_your_garden.name: Speed Up Your Garden
cfg.speed_up_your_garden.desc: Speed up your own garden beds so crops grow faster.
cfg.your_garden_multiplier.name: Your Garden Multiplier
cfg.your_garden_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_refugee_garden.name: Speed Up Refugee Garden
cfg.speed_up_refugee_garden.desc: Speed up the refugee camp garden beds (Game Of Crone DLC).
cfg.refugee_garden_multiplier.name: Refugee Garden Multiplier
cfg.refugee_garden_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_garden.name: Speed Up Zombie Garden
cfg.zombie_garden_multiplier.name: Zombie Garden Multiplier
cfg.zombie_garden_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_water_pump.name: Speed Up Water Pump
cfg.speed_up_water_pump.desc: Speed up your upgraded water pump so it produces water faster. Basic wells (Quarry, Village) are interaction-only and are not affected.
cfg.water_pump_multiplier.name: Water Pump Multiplier
cfg.water_pump_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_mines.name: Speed Up Zombie Mines
cfg.speed_up_zombie_mines.desc: Speed up ore output from zombie-staffed mines in the stone yard, marble deposit, and iron mine.
cfg.zombie_mines_multiplier.name: Zombie Mines Multiplier
cfg.zombie_mines_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_sawmill.name: Speed Up Zombie Sawmill
cfg.speed_up_zombie_sawmill.desc: Speed up plank and log output from the zombie sawmill.
cfg.zombie_sawmill_multiplier.name: Zombie Sawmill Multiplier
cfg.zombie_sawmill_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_vineyard.name: Speed Up Zombie Vineyard
cfg.speed_up_zombie_vineyard.desc: Speed up grape and wine output from the zombie vineyard.
cfg.zombie_vineyard_multiplier.name: Zombie Vineyard Multiplier
cfg.zombie_vineyard_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_brewery.name: Speed Up Zombie Brewery
cfg.speed_up_zombie_brewery.desc: Speed up beer output from the zombie brewery.
cfg.zombie_brewery_multiplier.name: Zombie Brewery Multiplier
cfg.zombie_brewery_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_winemaking.name: Speed Up Zombie Winemaking
cfg.speed_up_zombie_winemaking.desc: Speed up bottled wine output from the zombie winemaking station.
cfg.zombie_winemaking_multiplier.name: Zombie Winemaking Multiplier
cfg.zombie_winemaking_multiplier.desc: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.speed_up_zombie_crafting_table.name: Speed Up Zombie Crafting Table
cfg.speed_up_zombie_crafting_table.desc: Speed up output from the general-purpose zombie crafting table.
cfg.zombie_crafting_table_multiplier.des: How much faster this runs when the toggle above is on.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
